title: Talk About Jacqueline
writer: Henry Cass, Marjorie Deans, Katrin Holland
actors: Carla Lehmann, Hugh Williams, Joyce Howard
plot: While yachting and flirting on the Riviera, a woman with a past meets a shy, retiring young researcher from the Far East and, against her better judgment, marries him. When he runs across some scandalous gossip touching her past, ...
